title: HGL LIGHT UP BUBBLE GUN - Bright Lights and Big Bubbles, the Ultimate Bubble Blowing Gun
features: Bubble gun that lights up and blow bubbles, simply pull the tigger and create an amazing stream of bubbles
As the bubbles spray forwards, the body of the gun will illuminate and start to flash
It's hours o bubble blowing fun. Includes a bottle of special bubble mix
All HGL toys are kid-tested for fun, engagement, entertainment and play value. All are made with the highest quality materials and workmanship for long lasting value
Non-toxic and child-safe, meets and exceeds all UK, EU and US testing standards, a perfect gift for kids ages 3 +
description: Product Description Bubble gun that lights up and blow bubbles. Simply screw into place the included bottle of bubble mix, and then pull the trigger to unleash a constant stream of bubbles. As the bubbles spray forwards, the body of the gun will illuminate and start to flash. Unleash the magic of play with Tobar / HGL Toys, where imagination knows no bounds and adventure awaits around every corner. Tobar has been a trusted name in the world of toys, captivating hearts and minds with an extraordinary range of playthings that promise joy, creativity, and wonder for children of all ages. Toys that have stood the test of time and built to last through countless hours of entertainment. From classic retro to cutting-edge innovation there’s a Tobar toy for every age, interest and desire. All designed to ignite the flames of imagination. With their captivating designs, vivid colors, and unique features, they transport children to a world of endless possibilities, where creativity knows no bounds. Not just for play; they're also tools for learning, Tobar encourages curious minds to explore and discover the wonders of the world. Tobar believes in the power of play to bring families together. Their games and activities are perfect for creating memorable bonding moments, making every day a new adventure. Discover the enchanting world of Tobar, where joy, laughter, and exploration are at the forefront. Tobar empowers you to find the perfect toy to nurture the creativity, curiosity, and playfulness in your child. Elevate playtime to a whole new level and experience the magic of extraordinary toys. For almost 50 years we have offered high-quality, innovative and safe products that engage and enthrall children and adults alike. We strive to promote creativity, discovery, entertainment and imagination with products designed to delight and engineered to endure. From Impulse to Games, Plush to Outdoor, Figurines to Playsets. Along with Tobar products, One For Fun offers HGL toys, OzBozz Ride-ons and Bburago Race Cars and Maisto Collectible Diecast.
